div.head: 372. Memorandum From the President’s Assistant for National Security Affairs (Kissinger) to the Acting Secretary of Defense and the Director of Central Intelligence (Schlesinger), Washington, June 18, 1973.Source: National Archives, Nixon Presidential Materials, NSC Files, Box 565, Country Files, Far East, Thailand, Volume 10, 1973–. Secret; Sensitive. The Secretary of State also received a copy of this memorandum. Kissinger directed the DOD to fund the Thai Special Guerrilla Units during the 1974 fiscal year.
div.p:
MEMORANDUM FOR
THE ACTING SECRETARY OF DEFENSE
[text not declassified]

The memorandum of May 10 from the Secretary of Defense on this subject has been reviewed. In light of the considerations raised therein, the plan to maintain 17 battalions during the first half of Fiscal Year 1974 and 10 battalions in the second half should be implemented using the [text not declassified]. Action to withdraw the Thai SGUs from Laos should not be taken until further advised.
